Title: Relates to community preservation funds for the town of Clarkstown
Summary: Authorizes the town of Clarkstown to establish community preservation funds; establishes a real estate transfer tax with revenues therefrom to be deposited in said community preservation fund; provides for the repeal of such provisions upon the expiration thereof.
LawCode: Add §64-m, Town L; add Art 31-K §§1451-a - 1451-p, Tax L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the town law, in relation to authorizing the town of Clarkstown, county of Rockland to establish community preservation funds; to amend the tax law, in relation to authorizing the town of Clarkstown to impose a real estate transfer tax with revenues therefrom to be deposited in said community preservation fund; and providing for the repeal of certain provisions of the tax law upon expiration thereof
